name: cosmos
description: Carl Sagan's Cosmos — astronomy and science toolkit exploring the universe, the history of scientific discovery, the search for life beyond Earth, and our place in the vast cosmos
useCase: Understand the scale of the universe, explore the history of astronomy, learn about SETI and the meaning of life in the cosmos, and apply the cosmic perspective
knownRisks: The book was published in 1980 — some scientific data has been updated since then
Sagan's poetic style may not appeal to readers who prefer dry, technical science writing
The section on Venus and its greenhouse effect was prescient but some specifics are now better understood
